name: agdelte
description: Reactive UI Framework with Dependent Types in Agda

scripts.test:all: npm test && npm run test:smoke && npm run test:gl && npm run test:css && npm run test:agda && npm run test:array && npm run test:forms && npm run test:json && npm run test:datetime
scripts.css:all: npm run css:examples && npm run css:demo && npm run css:full-demo && npm run css:anim-data && npm run css:controls-demo && npm run css:controls && npm run css:index
scripts.build:main: agda --compile --compile-dir=_build --ghc-flag=-ihs --ghc-flag="-odir _build" --ghc-flag="-hidir _build" --ghc-flag="-package network" --ghc-flag="-package text" --ghc-flag="-package bytestring" --ghc-flag="-package stm" --ghc-flag="-package containers" --ghc-flag="-package websockets" --ghc-flag="-package warp" --ghc-flag="-package wai" --ghc-flag="-package wai-websockets" --ghc-flag="-package http-types" --ghc-flag="-package async" -i src -i server server/Main.agda
scripts.build:server: agda --compile --compile-dir=_build --ghc-flag=-ihs --ghc-flag="-odir _build" --ghc-flag="-hidir _build" --ghc-flag="-package network" --ghc-flag="-package text" --ghc-flag="-package bytestring" --ghc-flag="-package stm" --ghc-flag="-package containers" --ghc-flag="-package websockets" --ghc-flag="-package warp" --ghc-flag="-package wai" --ghc-flag="-package wai-websockets" --ghc-flag="-package http-types" --ghc-flag="-package async" server/HttpAgent.agda
scripts.build:multi-agent: agda --compile --compile-dir=_build --ghc-flag=-ihs --ghc-flag="-odir _build" --ghc-flag="-hidir _build" --ghc-flag="-package network" --ghc-flag="-package text" --ghc-flag="-package bytestring" --ghc-flag="-package stm" --ghc-flag="-package containers" --ghc-flag="-package websockets" --ghc-flag="-package warp" --ghc-flag="-package wai" --ghc-flag="-package wai-websockets" --ghc-flag="-package http-types" --ghc-flag="-package async" server/MultiAgent.agda
scripts.build:shared-demo: agda --compile --compile-dir=_build --ghc-flag=-ihs --ghc-flag="-odir _build" --ghc-flag="-hidir _build" --ghc-flag="-package network" --ghc-flag="-package text" --ghc-flag="-package bytestring" --ghc-flag="-package stm" --ghc-flag="-package containers" --ghc-flag="-package websockets" --ghc-flag="-package warp" --ghc-flag="-package wai" --ghc-flag="-package wai-websockets" --ghc-flag="-package http-types" --ghc-flag="-package async" server/SharedAgentDemo.agda
scripts.build:inspector-demo: agda --compile --compile-dir=_build --ghc-flag=-ihs --ghc-flag="-odir _build" --ghc-flag="-hidir _build" --ghc-flag="-package network" --ghc-flag="-package text" --ghc-flag="-package bytestring" --ghc-flag="-package stm" --ghc-flag="-package containers" --ghc-flag="-package websockets" --ghc-flag="-package warp" --ghc-flag="-package wai" --ghc-flag="-package wai-websockets" --ghc-flag="-package http-types" --ghc-flag="-package async" server/InspectorDemo.agda
scripts.build:test-server: ghc -ihs -o _build/Spec hs/test/Spec.hs -package hspec -package network -package text -package bytestring -package stm -package containers -package websockets -package warp -package wai -package wai-websockets -package http-types -package async -package case-insensitive -package unix -package directory

author: Nick Ivanych <Nick@Ivanych.net>
